description_long: This is a dark green, vintage-style flatbed truck with a robust, utilitarian design. The cab is compact and rounded, featuring a split windshield and a simple front grille with vertical slats. The cargo bed is open and rectangular, with high side panels and a flat floor, suitable for transporting goods or equipment. The truck has large, rugged tires and visible wheel arches, indicating it is built for durability and possibly off-road or heavy-duty use. The side mirrors are mounted on slender arms, and the rear of the truck is open, allowing easy loading and unloading. The overall appearance suggests a mid-20th-century military or industrial vehicle, commonly seen in urban or rural service roles.
description: A dark green, vintage flatbed truck with a compact cab and open cargo bed, designed for heavy-duty transport. It features large tires, high side panels, and a utilitarian, robust build.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open cargo bed with high side panels and the back of the cab.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the flatbed, the compact cab, and the large wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded cab, split windshield, and vertical grille slats.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the flatbed, cab, and wheel details.
